_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_azure.azure_security_secure_score. Mirrors oap-azure-mcp src/server.py azure_security_secure_score (lines ~5037-5067) which iterates client.secure_scores.list() from the Azure SDK SecurityCenter client. The 'ascScore' entry is the overall subscription-wide Defender for Cloud secure score. Wrapped in the same 3-layer mcp-proxy envelope as every other openagentic_azure tool.
